task_completion.description: Open the food.gdt dataset or write a script to open it
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Gretl main window showing 'food.gdt' as the active dataset, or a text editor/terminal showing a script with a command to open '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_data/food.gdt'.

task_completion.description: Estimate an OLS regression of food_exp on income
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Gretl model window displaying OLS results for 'food_exp' on 'income', or a script containing the regression command (e.g., 'ols food_exp const income').

task_completion.description: Extend the dataset with 3 new observations and set income values to 15, 20, and 25
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Gretl data editor showing observations 41-43 with income values 15, 20, and 25, or script commands extending the dataset by 3 observations and assigning these specific values.

task_completion.description: Generate forecasts with 95% prediction intervals for the new observations
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Gretl forecast window or output showing point forecasts and 95% prediction intervals for the new observations, or script commands generating these forecasts (e.g., 'fcast').

task_completion.description: Save the execution script to forecast_script.inp
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager, terminal (e.g., 'ls', 'cat'), or text editor showing that 'forecast_script.inp' has been saved in '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/'.

task_completion.description: Save the complete regression and forecast output to forecast_results.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager, terminal, or text editor showing that 'forecast_results.txt' has been saved in '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/' and contains the regression and forecast outputs.

integrity.description: Agent actually used Gretl (GUI or CLI) to perform the regression and forecasting
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent interacted with Gretl or ran a script using gretlcli, rather than just manually typing out a mock output file.

integrity.description: Agent did not hardcode the expected forecast values into the results file
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent did not just type the expected forecast values (236.56, 287.61, 338.66) directly into the results file without computing them via Gretl.

integrity.description: If a script was used, it contains actual Gretl commands and was executed
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the script contains actual Gretl commands (open, ols, addobs, fcast) and was executed to produce the results, rather than just echoing text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains 40 observations. The correct OLS regression coefficients are: intercept = 83.416, slope = 10.2096. The correct point forecasts for income levels 15, 20, and 25 are approximately 236.56, 287.61, and 338.66 respectively. The VLM should verify these values appear in the final output or Gretl windows to confirm correct execution.
